meta.title: Inalpha · Operator Console
meta.description: Read-only runtime dashboard for Inalpha paper trading.

overview.title: Portfolio Overview
overview.subtitle: A live snapshot of your account, positions, orders, and strategy pool.

fxWarning.title: FX conversion incomplete
fxWarning.body: Some currencies could not be converted — equity may be understated. The data layer never guesses a rate.

positions.title: Positions
positions.liqStale: Liquidation price (mark crossing it triggers liquidation)
positions.marginTitle: Initial margin used by this position

runnersPanel.title: Live Runners
runnersPanel.empty: No strategy running. Promote a candidate and start it — running strategies show up here.

strategyPanel.title: Strategy Pool
strategyPanel.empty: Strategy pool is empty. Have the agent write and backtest a strategy — it shows up here.

runners.title: Live Runners
runners.subtitle: Promoted strategies trading the live feed — status, PnL, and every bar-by-bar decision.
runners.empty: No strategy runs yet. Promote a candidate and start it to see live runners here.

detail.chartEmpty: No candles available for this instrument.
detail.decisionsEmpty: No decisions recorded yet — the runner hasn't placed an order.

factors.title: Effective Factors (Instrument)
factors.hint: Top effective factors (Rank IC) computed live for this runner's instrument. Recent IC (last ⅓ of the sample) flipping sign or fading toward zero vs the full-sample IC = the factor is decaying. Note: this is the instrument's current factor environment, not the factors referenced inside the strategy code.
factors.unavailable: Factor effectiveness unavailable (factor service down or insufficient data).
factors.empty: No factor passed the effectiveness threshold.

activity.title: Agent Activity
activity.subtitle: One timeline for everything the agents did across modules — scheduled runs, approvals, decisions, risk blocks, orders.
activity.sourceDown: {sources} unavailable — those events are missing from the feed.

footer.title: Activity log
footer.openConversation: Open this chat in the side panel

lab.title: Strategy Lab
lab.subtitle: LLM-authored strategy candidates, ranked by multi-objective fitness — with their latest backtest metrics.

detail.opsLogHint: This strategy's full lifecycle — created, promoted, every paper-trading start/stop.
detail.instancesEmpty: This strategy hasn't run paper trading yet. Promote and start it to see instances here.
detail.instancesHint: Price action and fills for the most recent run are shown below.
detail.backtestTradesEmpty: No fills in the latest backtest.
detail.backtestChartLoading: Loading bars for the backtest period…
detail.backtestChartError: Failed to load bars for this period.
detail.backtestChartEmpty: No bars available for this period.

factors.title: Factor Library
factors.subtitle: The full system factor catalog (pandas-ta / Alpha101 / qlib …) — click a card for what each factor measures. Per-instrument timing effectiveness lives on each runner's detail page.
factors.serviceDown: Factor service unavailable — the catalog can't be loaded.
factors.catalogHint: Every factor currently available in the system, grouped by source (instrument- and market-agnostic). Click a card to see what it measures and how to read it.

detail.universe: Originally a cross-sectional factor (needs a universe); approximated here as a single-instrument time series.
detail.noDescription: No description available for this factor yet.
detail.lowConfidence: Sample too small — don't time on this reading.
detail.legend: Rank IC: rank correlation between factor values and forward returns — larger magnitude means more timing information. Recent IC: IC over the last ⅓ of the sample; flipping sign or fading toward zero means the factor is decaying. ICIR: stability of the IC. Turnover: how fast the signal flips; high turnover means high trading friction in practice.

risk.title: Risk
risk.subtitle: Risk rules in force, and any locks currently blocking trades.
risk.locksEmpty: No active locks — nothing is being blocked.
risk.historyEmpty: No recent risk events — no locks or rejections lately.

common.truncated: Showing the latest {n} — earlier ones aren't listed here.

chat.title: Agent
chat.placeholder: Ask the agent — quotes, positions, strategies, backtests…
chat.empty: Chat with the agent here — it can pull quotes, read positions, run backtests, tune factors. Ask about any ticker.
chat.errorGeneric: Agent reply failed. Please retry — likely an upstream LLM error or dropped stream.

divination.pageSubtitle: Hesitant on direction? Draw an omikuji — a shrine fortune slip — at the shrine of Inari, the fox deity of fortune; an I Ching or Tarot reading for a second vantage. Before you commit, the call still belongs to the data and risk engine.
divination.questionPlaceholder: Write down what you can't settle (e.g. this direction — step in or wait)…
divination.defaultQuestion: This direction I'm eyeing — step in, or wait?
divination.emptyHint: Got something unresolved on your mind? Write it down, then cast a hexagram or draw a card. The same question yields the same sign — let the thought shift, then ask again.
divination.castError: The draw failed — please try again in a moment.
divination.historyEmpty: No divinations yet. Cast one to begin.
divination.consultPrompt: I just drew 【{summary}】 at the omikuji about: "{question}". Please read it for me in my language, weaving in this sign — purely for fun, not investment advice.
divination.noChangingLines: All lines still — no changing lines
divination.disclaimer: The omikuji is a perspective, not a signal · not investment advice · the trade still answers to data and risk

evolution.title: Evolution
evolution.subtitle: LLM-driven strategy mutation and evaluation — each run spawns candidates through code mutation, AST audit, sandboxing, and backtest evaluation.
evolution.empty: No evolution runs yet. Trigger one via the chat agent: "run evolution" or "evolve sma_cross".
evolution.truncated: Showing the latest {n} — earlier ones aren't listed here.
